caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a recording studio, positioned in front of a gray acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. A professional microphone, attached to a boom arm labeled "Rode", is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and looking toward someone off-screen to his right. He begins by gesturing with his right hand, which is partially raised and blurred due to motion. As the sequence progresses, he continues to smile and laugh, his facial expression becoming more animated. He remains seated in the same position, with the microphone and headphones stationary, while his head shifts slightly and his expression evolves from a smirk to a wide, open-mouthed laugh.
